hero.intro: I design and build full-stack web products. From the frontend you see to the APIs and servers running in the background.

terminal.welcome: Type 'help' to see the available commands.
terminal.unknown: is not recognized as a command. Type 'help'.

about.heading: Five years shaping fuzzy ideas into products people use daily. Clean code and a (healthy) obsession with the small stuff.
about.p1: I started in frontend out of curiosity, but got hooked on the whole stack. Today I'm just as comfortable modeling a database as I am tweaking a 60fps animation. It's the little things that make the difference: a well-handled empty state, microcopy that helps, those milliseconds you can actually feel.
about.p2: When I'm not coding, I'm probably taking some app apart to see how it works inside.

projects.intro: Six projects that show how I think, design, and build. Scroll to check them out →

dynerox.title: Dynerox
dynerox.description: Landing page for a virtual asset trading and verification platform in Mexico. Front-end development and design.

dynerox_coming_soon.title: Dynerox Coming Soon
dynerox_coming_soon.description: 'Coming Soon' landing page for a cryptocurrency trading platform. This version is disabled because Dynerox's new landing page replaced that link.

demo_stripe.title: Stripe Demo
demo_stripe.description: Demo of the Stripe test environment. Simulates card payments with test cards without moving real money.

api_stripe.title: Stripe API
api_stripe.description: Stripe demo API. Test payments, subscriptions, and webhooks in a sandbox environment.

demo_chat.title: Chat Demo
demo_chat.description: Front-end chat demo built with React and Vite. A modern, fast interface to explore real-time messaging features.

api_demo_chat.title: Chat Demo API
api_demo_chat.description: Backend API for chat built with Node.js and Socket.io. Manages users, messages, and real-time connections.
